creator: lcook@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Juraj Lutter from comment #2)
That's not required. Only in the circumstances I wasn't the maintainer of this port then would I require the maintainer-feedback+ flag. Otherwise, setting maintainer-approval+ of the attachment is sufficient enough in this case. :-)

https://wiki.freebsd.org/Bugzilla/ThePerfectPortsIssue is a good for this.

Cheers!
